sales.description:
Gallienus, Aureus, 260-268, Siscia, Unpublished, Gold, NGC, MS 4/5-3/5
Gallienus, Aureus, 260-268, Siscia, Unpublished, Unique, RIC:--. From the Long Valley River Collection; Ex James Howard (1937-2009) Collection. Graded NGC MS Strike: 4/5 Surface: 3/5 - brushed., Laureate head of Gallien, right., Mars advancing right wearing crested helmet, cuirass, pteruges and high caligae with ties, holding spear in right hand and shield in left hand., Graded NGC MS Strike: 4/5 Surface: 3/5 - brushed.
